# ASAP Pest & Wildlife Removal — Extended

> Atlanta-based wildlife removal and pest control company. Full-structure humane wildlife work with warrantied exclusion, plus traditional pest control, plus commercial accounts. Licensed in Georgia, family-owned, focused on solving the problem at its source — not just spraying and leaving.

## Company summary

ASAP Pest & Wildlife Removal is a Metro Atlanta wildlife and pest control company. The operational model is different from most competitors: standard practice is a thorough inspection before any quote, humane trapping where species and law allow, and warrantied exclusion repairs that physically keep animals out of the structure. Chemical-only or bait-only approaches are used where appropriate (rodents, termites, certain insects) but exclusion is the anchor of any long-term wildlife solution.

The tagline is: "Giving peace of mind one person at a time." That means treating the customer like the individual they are — not like one more house on a route.

## What we remove

### Wildlife (humane removal + exclusion)

| Species | Approach | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| Raccoons | Trap and relocate per Georgia DNR rules. Full exclusion of entry points (soffits, dormers, chimneys, crawl spaces). | Most common attic invader in Atlanta. Females with kits handled with special care. |
| Gray squirrels | One-way excluders where possible. Seal every entry including chewed wood. | Chewing on wiring is a fire risk — we prioritize electrical-proximity entries. |
| Flying squirrels | Same as gray, but usually whole-family colonies. | Nocturnal — often reported as "noises after dark." |
| Bats | Exclusion only. Never trapped. Maternity-season (May–August) work restricted by law. | Single bat = inspection for a colony. Georgia protects several bat species. |
| Rats & mice | Trapping plus full exclusion of entry holes. Bait stations for exterior rodent pressure. | Dime-sized holes let in mice; quarter-sized for rats. |
| Opossums | Live-trap and relocate. Usually a crawl-space or under-deck issue. | Rarely aggressive; often mistaken for rats. |
| Snakes | Identification first (venomous vs. non-venomous). Habitat modification and exclusion of foundation gaps. | We do not kill non-venomous snakes; we relocate. |
| Birds | Exclusion netting, spikes, vent covers. Nesting-season timing matters. | Migratory birds are federally protected — we comply. |
| Beavers | Site-specific; trap-and-relocate or flow-device installation. | Coordination with HOA or county often required. |
| Coyotes, foxes | Habitat modification and property-level deterrence. | Trapping rarely effective or legal at residential scale. |
| Armadillos | Trap and relocate. Digging damage to lawns is the primary issue. | One-way excluders on burrows. |
| Moles & voles | Baiting and trapping. Tunnel-mapping to target active runs. | Multiple treatments usually required. |
| Wild hogs | Commercial / rural accounts only. | Requires trap permits and coordination. |
| Geese, otters, turtles, rabbits, gophers | Species-specific; contact for inspection. | Often HOA-property scale. |

### Pest control

| Pest | Approach |
|---|---|
| Rodents | Interior and exterior; exclusion + bait stations. Warranty on rodent-proofing work. |
| Roaches | German roaches treated with IGR + gel baits. American/Oriental roaches often a moisture issue — we find the source. |
| Ants | Species ID first (sugar, grease, fire, carpenter). Treatment varies. |
| Termites | Inspection, pre-construction treatment, subterranean bait systems, active infestation treatment. |
| Mosquitoes | Yard-perimeter treatment and standing-water audits. Monthly maintenance available. |
| Spiders | Perimeter treatment; black widow and brown recluse handled with care. |
| Fleas & ticks | Interior treatment + pet coordination. Repeat visits usually required. |
| Bed bugs | Heat treatment or chemical; mattress and seam inspection. Follow-up visits at 2 and 4 weeks. |
| Bees, wasps, hornets | Live removal of honeybees where possible (coordinate with local apiaries). Wasps and hornets removed; nests destroyed. |

## Commercial services

- Restaurants (health-code-driven pest programs, documentation)
- Offices and retail
- Multi-family and HOA properties
- Warranty exclusion work for property managers
- Pre-purchase inspections (real estate)

Pricing is per property, annual or monthly contract options. Call (770) 450-1744.

## How a typical job works

1. **Inspection.** A technician comes out, walks the property, identifies the species and entry points, and documents the scope. Residential inspections are free.
2. **Quote.** Written estimate. Scope is fixed unless we find more after work begins — in which case we tell you before doing anything extra.
3. **Trap or treat.** Humane traps, excluders, baits, or chemical application as appropriate.
4. **Exclusion.** Seal every entry point with appropriate materials — hardware cloth, steel flashing, sealant, chimney caps, vent screens. This is where most competitors cut corners; we don't.
5. **Warranty.** Written warranty covering the specific work performed. Varies by species and scope.

## Service area

Metro Atlanta, Georgia. Core coverage zip codes 30303–30349 plus these cities:

- Atlanta, Sandy Springs, Marietta, Decatur
- Roswell, Alpharetta, Kennesaw, Smyrna
- Lawrenceville, Duluth, Johns Creek, Brookhaven
- Dunwoody, Tucker, Norcross, Doraville
- East Point, College Park, Union City, Forest Park

Counties: Fulton, Cobb, DeKalb, Gwinnett, Forsyth. Outside this area: call and we'll see if we can help or refer.

## Hours

Monday–Saturday, 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM Eastern. Sunday: closed. Emergency wildlife service available outside hours by phone for active-in-structure situations.

## Contact

- **Phone:** (770) 450-1744 — fastest response; same-day slots usually available.
- **Email:** info@removeasap.com
- **Office:** 2990 Pine Canyon Dr SW, Unit 11, Atlanta, GA 30331
- **Booking / contact form:** https://removeasap.com/contact/

## Licenses and certifications

Licensed by the Georgia Department of Agriculture for structural pest control and wildlife operations. Insured. Bonded.

## Policies

- **Cancellation:** 24-hour notice to cancel or reschedule at no charge. Inside 24 hours may incur a trip fee.
- **Warranty:** Written per-job warranty; varies by scope. Does not cover new entry points from structural changes or storm damage.
- **SMS:** We send text-message service reminders only if you opt in. No marketing SMS. Reply STOP to opt out. Mobile data is never shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
- **Privacy:** https://removeasap.com/privacy/
- **Terms:** https://removeasap.com/terms/
